positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed mandala-style illustration centered around a stylized bioluminescent forest and crescent moon. The composition features intricate, interconnected flora (fern spirals, glowing moss) interwoven with subtle celestial elements (tiny nebulae, stardust trails). Use a dominant color palette of deep indigo, cosmic teal, vibrant emerald green, and soft lavender, contrasted sharply with crisp white and gold leaf accents. The style should be a blend of neo-art nouveau and mystical tattoo flash, emphasizing clean, graphic lines and strong, flat silhouettes suitable for screen printing on apparel. The forest elements should radiate outwards from the center, creating an enclosed, dreamlike portal effect. Overhead studio lighting, perfect symmetry, vector art quality, high resolution.
negative: blur, watermark, text, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, sketch, grayscale, oversaturated, noisy, artifacts, messy, realistic photo, logos, trademarks
